Add one or more contact people for this vendor. At least one is required.

#{{ i + 1 }} @if (contactGroup.get('isPrimary')?.value) { Primary Contact } @else { }
@if (isInvalid(contactGroup.get('name'))) { Contact name is required }
@if (isInvalid(contactGroup.get('email'))) { @if (contactGroup.get('email')?.hasError('required')) { Email is required } @else if (contactGroup.get('email')?.hasError('email')) { Enter a valid email } }
}

Location
